CREATE TABLE test_strings (id UInt32, text String);
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES (1, 'ClickHouse® is a column-oriented database management system (DBMS) for online analytical processing of queries (OLAP).');
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES (2, 'ClickHouse is designed for high performance analytics.');
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES (3, 'ClickHouse features efficient query processing.');
SELECT wordShingleSimHash(text, 3) AS Hash FROM test_strings WHERE id = 1;
SELECT wordShingleSimHash(text, 5) AS Hash FROM test_strings WHERE id IN (1, 2);
SELECT id, wordShingleSimHash(text, 4) AS Hash FROM test_strings WHERE wordShingleSimHash(text, 4) < 1000000000000000000;
SELECT wordShingleSimHash(text, 1) AS Hash FROM (SELECT text FROM test_strings WHERE id = 3) AS subquery;

SELECT a.text, b.text, wordShingleSimHash(a.text, 2) AS HashA, wordShingleSimHash(b.text, 2) AS HashB FROM test_strings AS a JOIN test_strings AS b ON a.id != b.id WHERE wordShingleSimHash(a.text, 2) = wordShingleSimHash(b.text, 2);
SELECT wordShingleSimHash('Example string for testing.', 1) AS Hash;
SELECT wordShingleSimHash('The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog.', 25) AS Hash;
SELECT wordShingleSimHash(CONCAT(text, ' More text.'), 3) AS Hash FROM test_strings WHERE id = 2;
